features: QUICKLY COOLS - 15 MINS! Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, helps reduce puffiness. Quickly cools in 15 minutes. Suitable for daily use
HAYFEVER EYES: Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, is used when there is a need to sooth tired, irritated, puffy and inflamed eyes and the surrounding area. Soothes irritated hay fever eyes.
REFRESH & REVIVE: Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, designed for comfort and convenience and will refresh and revives the eyes and surrounding skin. Add to holiday and travel bags.
HOW TO USE: Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, should be washed with clean, soapy water, rinsed and dried before use. Place in the refrigerator, then use as required. Clean and keep cool between uses
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Single re-useable Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask
description: Product Description Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, helps reduce puffiness. Designed for comfort and convenience and will refresh and revives the eyes and surrounding skin. Add to holiday and travel bags. Quickly cools in 15 minutes. Suitable for daily use. Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, is used when there is a need to sooth tired, irritated, puffy and inflamed eyes and the surrounding area. Soothes irritated hay fever eyes. Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, should be washed with clean, soapy water, rinsed and dried before use. Place in the refrigerator, then use as required. Clean and keep cool between uses. Single re-useable Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask. Search Amazon.co.uk for the Nuage range of products Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only.
